section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor took pictures of the scars today.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Image capture is an action/procedure performed as part of management and could reasonably be documented in the Plan; however, it also reflects something that was done today and does not substantially mislead the reader when placed in Objective.
The presence of scars is a physical finding rather than an assessment or diagnostic impression; placing it in Assessment is slightly misleading organizationally but unlikely to cause major confusion.
